title: enecho #1758
definition:
1) to have within, to hold in
    1a) to be held, entangled, be held ensnared
    1b) to be engaged with, set one's self against, hold a grudge
        against someone
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to have within, to hold in
    1a) to be held, entangled, be held ensnared
    1b) to be engaged with, set one's self against, hold a grudge
        against someone

    NASB:  to hold in or upon, i.e. to ensnare, by impl. to keep a grudge:
